source: Local benchmark of published packages installed from npm.
note: Sizes are bundled, minified, gzipped; okhash's is the gzip of its own shipped tsdown build (tools/measure-metrics.mjs), the same number shown elsewhere on the page. Latency is each package's direct hex path timed over 64 rotating uncached inputs with tinybench — the same method as this repository's headline latency gate (tools/measure-bench.mjs), so okhash's figure here equals the headline number. All packages timed in one process on the Node version below.

packages.name: color-hash
packages.note: BKDR hash; SHA-256 default near 4,919 ns

packages.name: string-to-color
packages.note: color-name-aware mixing; not a one-to-one match
